fix: production-grade console streaming and RCON reliability

Root cause analysis and targeted fixes for Server Console and RCON
features that remained broken after 20+ prior PRs.

Console fixes:
- Replace per-client Docker stream spawning with shared fan-out manager
  (LogStreamerManager) — one stream per server, N subscribers
- Fix cursor dedup bug: seen_cursors.clear() dropped ALL dedup context
  at 4000 entries; now uses LRU trim (keep 3000 of 4000)
- Eliminate dual REST+WS initial data load that caused duplicate lines;
  single WS path with ring buffer backfill
- Add sequence-based reconnect (since_seq) instead of ambiguous
  tail+since timestamp combination
- Add granular connection states: backfilling, stream_failed,
  server_not_running, container_not_found
- Add heartbeat messages for connection liveness detection
- Add 30s keepalive timeout in WS handler

RCON fixes:
- Remove preflight probe gate that blocked WebSocket connection — probe
  is now advisory; WS opens whenever server is running
- Add classified error types from backend: auth_failed, timeout,
  disabled, unreachable, rate_limited, invalid_command
- Check RCON password configuration before accepting WS (close 4007)
- Add command round-trip timing (duration_ms) in responses
- Reduce probe frequency from 30s to 60s; skip while WS connected

Observability:
- Structured logging with event names for all WS lifecycle events
- Health/diagnostics endpoints: GET /servers/{id}/console/health,
  GET /servers/{id}/rcon/health
- Log subscriber join/leave, backfill counts, stream start/stop

New file: backend/services/log_streamer.py
Modified: backend/routes/servers.py (WS handlers)
Modified: frontend ConsoleModule.jsx, RconModule.jsx

docs: 同步 OpenClaw 工具权限模型与 USACHI_HOME 路径改动

## 变更概要

### 1. 运行目录：硬编码路径 → USACHI_HOME 环境变量

- 技术栈表 DB 路径说明更新
- 数据库 Schema 章节路径说明重写：
  说明 dbPath 存相对路径，运行时由 resolveRuntimePath() 解析，
  保证同一份 config.json 在宿主机和容器里均可工作
- 目录结构：新增 src/utils/runtime-paths.ts 条目
- 配置文件位置章节：~/mybot/ → $USACHI_HOME/（附默认值说明）
- 微信持久化路径：~/mybot/wechat/ → $USACHI_HOME/wechat/
- 环境变量章节：新增 USACHI_HOME 变量及注释
- Docker 章节：
  volume 从 ~/mybot:/root/mybot 改为 ./data:/app/data
  新增 USACHI_HOME=/app/data/mybot 环境变量
  新增「dev 与 Docker 共享同一份数据」说明

### 2. UsachiConfig.tools：新增 policy 字段

在 tools 配置结构中新增可选 policy 字段，完整描述 OpenClaw 策略类型：
- profile：内置 profile 枚举（minimal / chat / coding / full）
- allow / deny：显式工具名或 group:xxx 列表
- byProvider：按 provider 覆盖
- byModel：按具体模型覆盖（优先级最高）

配置初始化流程更新：增加 normalizeToolPolicy() 步骤

### 3. Section 4 工具权限模型：整节重写

旧内容（按 localAccess 子开关逐条控制）已替换为完整的 OpenClaw 描述：
- getAllSkills 签名新增 modelId 参数
- 解析顺序：global → byProvider → byModel，高层覆盖低层
- deny 优先于 allow（同层内）
- 内置 profile 工具集对照表（minimal / chat / coding / full）
- 默认 profile：coding
- localAccess 作最终硬限制的语义说明（策略控制意图，localAccess 控制物理约束）
- 通道权限：web/tui 视管理员，缺失上下文不默认放行（安全收紧）
- 配置示例：按模型给 Haiku/Sonnet 设不同 profile

### 4. 记忆提取：3 次并发 → 1 次结构化提取

说明改为：异步调用 LLM 对最近 10 条消息做一次结构化提取（JSON schema 约束输出），
同时产出 facts / episodes / userProfile。提取使用 getEffectiveModel()，不硬编码 provider。

### 5. 目录结构：新增文件条目

- src/core/tool-policy.ts（OpenClaw 策略解析器）
- src/utils/runtime-paths.ts（USACHI_HOME 路径解析）
- web/src/lib/tool-policy.ts（前端纯函数 helper）
- web/src/lib/api.ts 注释更新（ToolPolicy 类型 + TOOL_POLICY_PROVIDERS 常量）

### 6. 构建指令模板：第 6 条更新

旧：工具权限模型使用 localAccess 配置驱动
新：工具权限模型使用 tools.policy 配置驱动（OpenClaw 三层解析说明）

commit.message:
fix(node): allocate both ports atomically to eliminate race condition

Introduce getFreePorts(n) which holds all n sockets open simultaneously
before releasing them together. This prevents another process from
claiming httpPort in the gap between the two sequential getFreePort()
calls, and guarantees the two ports are distinct.
